description: Saddle-first reproducer chain blindness witness for the HBR-EW-scale repro.
protocol: The S^4-bounce solver and its output S_bounce are committed strictly before the EW-scale matching script consumes them. Any re-determination of S_bounce must commit the new saddle output before the matching is re-run; otherwise the prospective protocol (tests/test_saddle_blindness_protocol.py) rejects the rebuild.
